questions.question: How old is Riruka? (At the time of the Lost Agent of the Shinigami arc.)
questions.reponse: She’s 15 years old.

questions.question: Sensei, when drawing manga, do you pretend to be the central character at that moment, before drawing? Or do you always maintain an objective perspective?
questions.reponse: Rather than getting into the role of the character, I draw them as if they were right in front of me. When I try to fully embody a character, I feel that the range of the character narrows because there are limits to my own perception.

questions.question: Why is it called “Karakura Town”?
questions.reponse: The name comes from the mental image of an empty body with a missing soul (in other words, a corpse).

questions.question: Among the Shinigami, there are some who hide the abilities of their own Zanpakutō, and there are some who remain silent about the fact that they can perform Bankai, but aren’t there any rules that require them to declare this information?
questions.reponse: Of course, they have an obligation to report on these things.

questions.question: With respect to BLEACH, I get the impression that there are few explanations of the situation or a character’s abilities which resemble a ‘voice from above’. Is there something you’re particular about with regard to this aspect?
questions.reponse: I feel like it kills the immersion so I make an effort to avoid using it. Though, I don’t particularly dislike this aspect when it comes to reading.

questions.question: I love the Visored! While there may be differences in the balance of mastery or ineptitude over the Zankensoki, strictly speaking, who is the strongest among those eight when it comes to battle? If the ability of the Zanpakutō is direct attack type, I somehow feel that the user may not have an aptitude for Kidō too, so I would be glad if you could also tell me who is the most adept at Kidō, putting aside Hacchi!
questions.reponse: If we take “adept at Kidō” to mean “a wide range of Kidō variations can be used” then after Haachi, it’s Rose. As for who the strongest is, that’s hard to say because it depends on the conditions.

questions.question: How did the Visored previously make a living? Also, Hiyori has a part-time job, but are Love and Hacchi working too?
questions.reponse: Hacchi collaborates with Tessai to develop Kidō goods for use in the Soul Society. Love works part-time at a second hand clothes store.

questions.question: What specific tasks does Kubo-sensei do when taking on the role of “supervisor” for things like Brave Souls, movies, anime, etc.? For things like Brave Souls, do you check and make corrections to the designs that have been submitted to you?
questions.reponse: The degree of supervision varies depending on the case, and that’s the way it is for Brave Souls too.

questions.question: It was explained within the story that Zaraki Kenpachi took a sword from a Shinigami, but if the Shinigami who had their sword taken were still alive and had achieved Shikai and Bankai, would they end up having a similar ability to Zaraki’s Nozarashi?
questions.reponse: That wouldn’t happen. Abilities can be overwritten prior to Shikai acquisition (and depending on the person, even after its acquisition).

questions.question: Rukia and Renji are a working couple, but did Ichika go to nursery school or a daycare center when she was very young, prior to entering the Shin'ō Academy?
questions.reponse: Even though they both took childcare leave, several nannies dispatched by the Kuchiki clan were always stationed at the Abarai residence.

questions.question: Is the marriage rate low for the Captains and Vice-Captains of the Gotei 13? Are there any Captain class Shinigami we don’t know about who are actually married?
questions.reponse: There is no one among the current members. I feel like there aren’t many among that lot who seem capable of maintaining a married life….

questions.question: Previously, in response to a question about the names of Hollows, you answered that “there is a person in charge of naming them”, but do they name each Hollow one by one? Or are these names only given to Hollows who have murdered Shinigami, or caused a great deal of damage to the Human World
questions.reponse: It’s the latter. Other Hollows are assigned numbers and such based on what is captured.

questions.question: About Unagiya Kaoru, he is the son of Unagiya Ikumi and who else? My personal prediction is that it’s Tsukishima-san!
questions.reponse: What a frightening prospect.

questions.question: Are all the artwork which appear in Guidelines on KlubOutside drawn by Kubo-sensei while your assistants draw the background and other elements?
questions.reponse: That’s right. Characters, drawn lettering and effects are my job, while the background, motion lines and screentones are my assistant’s job.

questions.question: It is mentioned that Urahara created his healing hot springs by imitating Kirinji’s baths, but do these baths still remain in Soul Society? Or did he go to the Soul King Palace and analyze them?
questions.reponse: A few still remain in a remote area of Rukongai.

questions.question: Why does Bakudō #81. “Dankū” possess the anti-Hadō capability to “completely block Hadō numbered 89 and below”? I speculate that in the past, Shinigami who were skilled in Hadō numbered 89 and below had turned hostile, so Dankū was created as a countermeasure to that.
questions.reponse: That’s a good guess.

questions.question: Why does Orihime call Grimmjow “Grimmjow” but Ulquiorra “Ulquiorra-kun”?
questions.reponse: That’s because the atmosphere on their first meeting was not one where she was able to address Grimmjow with the -kun honorific. Though, I also think Ulquiorra is the same in that regard.

questions.question: Please tell us the gender of Nianzol Weizol.
questions.reponse: You’ll know when you hear his voice in the anime, but he’s a man.

questions.question: Are the attack methods which utilize Gintō and the Medallion chant used by Ebern all techniques which are classified as “Kirchenlied”?
questions.reponse: “Kirchenlied” is the equivalent of a Shinigami’s “Kidō”, therefore that is the case for most techniques which correspond to a spell.

questions.question: Does Driscoll’s Overkill become stronger based on the number of people killed from the time he received his Schrift to now? Or does the buff expire at the end of the battle or some other point?
questions.reponse: The buff is removed by sleeping, eating, or loss of consciousness.

questions.question: Are there any characters among the BLEACH cast who wear perfume, or has an image of their scent been decided upon in Kubo-sensei’s mind?
questions.reponse: I’ve been asked quite frequently to release perfume, so I’m starting to think it might be nice to do so. I don’t use perfumes but sometimes I’ll buy them when I want the bottle….

questions.question: Nimaiya Ōetsu makes the Asauchi, but did he create them with Shikai and Bankai in mind from the very outset?
questions.reponse: That is the correct order of events.

questions.question: Shishigawara-kun’s Fullbring “Jackpot Knuckle” has a characteristic where the probability of hitting the jackpot ends up decreasing with continuous use, but will the probability of a jackpot be restored once it has already been decreased?
questions.reponse: There is a gradual recovery from misfortune (taking damage, etc.). Full recovery occurs when crossing over to the next day at midnight.

questions.question: When did Hirako Shinji get his tongue pierced? It wasn’t pierced during The Past arc, was it…?
questions.reponse: I always forget to draw it, so I may not even include it anymore.

questions.question: Is the hierarchy of strength for the Bambies: Liltotto > Giselle > Meninas > Bambi > Candice?
questions.reponse: If they engage in battle with Blut, then that’s probably the order. If it’s a bare-handed fight then it’s: Liltotto → Meninas → Candice → Gigi → Bambi.

questions.question: Vice-Captain Madarame comes from a distinguished family, but what about 3rd seat Ayasegawa?
questions.reponse: Yumichika was an abandoned child from Rukongai.

questions.question: When I look at Rickenbacker, I get a buddy-like vibe and at the same time a faint sense of some maternal quality, but do Dragons even have things like gender?
questions.reponse: They do. By the way, Rickenbacker is male.

questions.question: The Kōtotsu was completely destroyed by Aizen, but after that, didn’t any problems arise within the Dangai?
questions.reponse: It will be restored within the next seven days.

questions.question: Urahara-san runs a small-time candy shop in the Human World, but is there some specific reason why he chose to open up a candy shop?
questions.reponse: It’s because Kisuke thought that candy shops were the best in that he could open and close the shop as he pleases, and even if he stocks strange items, it’s harder to suspect anything is out of the ordinary.

questions.question: Will there not be a BLEACH themed pachinko machine released?
questions.reponse: There are no such plans, but the staging aspect certainly sounds entertaining.

questions.question: When Ichigo wears his sword, he carries Zangetsu on his back, but how is it held in place?
questions.reponse: The sash on the hilt is wrapped around the chain along with the blade.

questions.question: Is Yukio unmarried in the Echoing Jaws of Hell arc?
questions.reponse: He’s unmarried. It doesn’t seem very likely that he’ll marry….

questions.question: When I was looking at the art of BLEACH, I got the impression of ballet movements. Sensei, do you ever watch ballet?
questions.reponse: I sometimes watch Lausanne on TV, but I’m not very familiar with it. If anything, I suppose the sharp-tongued humor is the thing that I find interesting to watch.

questions.question: Kotetsu Kiyone and Kotsubaki Sentarō share the same birthday, are they twins related by blood?
questions.reponse: They’re unrelated, but every year, they were made to sit side-by-side by Ukitake and celebrate their birthdays together.

questions.question: How do Arrancar acquire a Zanpakutō? Do their broken mask pieces transform into Zanpakutō after they become Arrancar?
questions.reponse: I’ll tell you because I don’t particularly feel like drawing it, but the torn part of the mask becomes the sword. So you are correct.

questions.question: During the Quincy invasion, Mayuri modified his room and clothes to make them glow so that they wouldn’t cast shadows, but wouldn’t a shadow be created in Nemu’s cleavage if left like that?
questions.reponse: Now that you mention it, that’s true…. I should have placed a glow stick or something between her breasts.

questions.question: How did you feel when BLEACH was parodied in Gintama?
questions.reponse: When we first met, I was the one who told Sorachi-san “you can do whatever you want

questions.question: Is Hikifune Kirio-san’s Tree of Life based on a similar principle to Kidō?
questions.reponse: It’s similar, but since it can only be used by one individual, I guess it’s something closer to Ganju’s Seppa….

questions.question: Findorr Calius adjusted his own strength by breaking his mask, but is it also possible to restore his broken mask and strength back to their original state.
questions.reponse: It’s possible. Even if it’s left alone, it will gradually return to its original state. It’s kind of like an injury.

questions.question: Would you consider composing something like another official spin-off that is drawn in a light-hearted and humorous manner?
questions.reponse: If someone else were to draw something amusing, I’d also like to see it.

questions.question: I have a question about Ayon and Orihime’s abilities! After creating Ayon, if the arms of Apacci and the others were healed via Orihime’s powers, could something like an 'Ayon duplication bug’ occur?
questions.reponse: If the bodies of Apacci and co. can endure the rapid continuous regeneration process, a duplication bug is possible.

questions.question: Can Minazuki’s size be changed at will?
questions.reponse: The size can vary considerably. The smallest size is around the size of a puppy.

questions.question: I totally want the shoes that Rabu is wearing in the new artwork. Are there any plans to turn them into merch in the future!!!!?
questions.reponse: I love shoes, so I’d be happy if merchandise in the form of shoes that a character is seen wearing could be sold, but I wonder if that can happen.

questions.question: Quilge Opie used Ransōtengai, but no other Quincy were seen utilizing this technique. Is this simply because Quilge Opie has both the talent and understanding?
questions.reponse: That’s right. Quilge is the combat instructor of the Sternritter, and Quilge’s students can also be found among the current Wörtlich.

questions.question: Gin’s Bankai, Kamishini no Yari, had the ability to leave a piece of the sword within the body of his opponent... will the part that was lost through this process never return to its original state again?
questions.reponse: The part left inside the body is made of poison, and since the poison is a secretion of the sword, it will return to its original state after a certain amount of time.

questions.question: Each Division among the Gotei 13 has its own Squad Flower... but are there opportunities to study Hanakotoba as part of a Shinigami’s cultivation at the Academy?
questions.reponse: They learn about the Squad Flowers, but Izuru seems to be well-acquainted with things like Hanakotoba in a general sense.

questions.question: Are there any characters that you wanted to present as enemies even though they are allies, and are there any characters where the reverse is true?
questions.reponse: There isn’t any. Each character can only come to fit into their role because of the relationship they have with those around them.

questions.question: Before the establishment of the Shinigami Research and Development Institute, was there no research institution in Soul Society?
questions.reponse: At one point, there was a group who, though unofficial, were close in that regard. That group disappeared and there was a period of time where no similar organization existed. Mayuri belonged to the first group. Senjumaru was their leader.

questions.question: It is explained in the manga that Lloyd R, the younger brother, can imitate physical likeness and memories, but why is he able to use Yhwach’s abilities and weapons?
questions.reponse: Each Lloyd brother can either 'perfectly’ copy memories, or 'perfectly’ copy powers respectively, any aspect outside of that can be copied on a scale of 70-80%. This is because being able to copy only memories or only powers is of little use.

questions.question: Do you have a PS5?
questions.reponse: I don’t have one.

questions.question: What are the future plans for the floor of the 9th Division barracks which Mayuri destroyed with his eye beam in the one-shot?
questions.reponse: They’ll submit the bill to the 12th Division, and if that does work, they’ll submit the bill to the 1st Division, and if that still doesn’t work, then one way or another Shūhei will probably end up paying for it.

questions.question: Who is the President of the Shinigami Women’s Association by the time of the Echoing Jaws of Hell arc?
questions.reponse: The President is Rangiku and the Chairwoman is Yoruichi. By the way, Soifon calls herself Vice-Chairwoman without asking anyone.

questions.question: Is the aspect of death governed by the Espada the same for different people, as long as they have the same number, like Harribel and Nelliel, for instance?
questions.reponse: It’s the same. Nelliel is also "sacrifice”.

questions.question: Does sensei have an ability to sense the supernatural?
questions.reponse: I don’t. But I’ve been told a few times "you must have a sixth sense, for sure!” But, I don’t.

questions.question: If the posters will be expanded on in the future, will the designs from the Shibuya poster takeover be made into merch?
questions.reponse: I like those posters too, so I’m hoping they’ll sell well in the FC.

questions.question: Does the blade grow as a Zanpakutō develops?
questions.reponse: The length of an Asauchi does not change, however when Shikai is used it will change in accordance with its development.

questions.question: Is there some special relationship between the Komamura family and the Shihōin clan in BLEACH given that they are dogs and cats?
questions.reponse: “Komamura” is the surname given to him when he was taken in by Genryūsai, it is not associated with his family lineage.

questions.question: Were Yumichika and Yachiru’s hair ornaments made by Ikkaku?
questions.reponse: Yachiru’s hair ornament is handcrafted by Ikkaku. Yumichika bought his accessories himself.

questions.question: Did Mizuiro’s parents pay for his high school tuition?
questions.reponse: It was paid for with child-support payments from his father.

questions.question: Does the position of Substitute Shinigami come without compensation?
questions.reponse: In the beginning, the position was without reward. After receiving the Substitute Badge, it’s now come to be that a reward will be deposited within a Seireitei account. Ichigo hasn’t been informed though.

questions.question: Will sensei be eating osechi during New Year’s?
questions.reponse: I eat it every year. Currently, I’m in the process of searching for osechi that suits my tastes. After all, you only get one chance a year.

questions.question: When Don Kanonji first appeared, he was performing an exorcism at an abandoned hospital, was it Ishida who tried to stop Kanonji’s exorcism at the beginning?
questions.reponse: Yes.

questions.question: I noticed something in the Echoing Jaws of Hell arc section of BLEACH EX. the “Taka” which came out with Rindō Atau’s Zanpakutō ability was “Washi” in the rough draft, right?
questions.reponse: I believe this was because eagle in sign language is the same as hawk and was derived from hawk to begin with, and also because hawks have a stronger Japanese image.

questions.question: Ayon ended up being defeated both times in the story, but let’s assume he wasn’t defeated, would he continue to exist forever…?
questions.reponse: After a short while, he will self-destruct, and not long after that, the arms of Apacci and the others will grow back.

questions.question: Due to the actions of PePe Waccabrada, Shūhei and Byakuya fought each other, but Byakuya behaved as if he were trying to avoid hurting Shūhei as much as possible. I feel that Byakuya’s views and personality have changed. What do you think?
questions.reponse: I think you’re right.

questions.question: What time does sensei wake up every morning?
questions.reponse: I’ve been quite busy lately, so ten o'clock. I can’t even watch Love It! in real time anymore….

questions.question: Was it because her five older brothers had passed away that Soi Fon succeeded as the head of Fon family?
questions.reponse: The strongest person in that generation becomes the head of the family, regardless of gender.

questions.question: I would like to know the Shikai abilities of the three seated officers of the 3rd Division who were instantly killed by Bazz-B in volume 56!
questions.reponse: Those abilities which never got a chance to be showcased are a secret because I may use them somewhere else.

questions.question: Kubo-sensei, you mentioned that you draw illustrations on the larger iPad pro, so I also want to try an iPad for the first time... I would like to hear about the types of brushes you use in Clip Studio Paint when line drawing and when adding color?
questions.reponse: I hope it becomes lighter. As for pens, I often use a pen called Kasure Kashi and for brushes I use one called Muk01. I separate the layers depending on my mood.

questions.question: I would like to know the name of the technique that was used when Kirinji Tenjirō got behind Soi Fon. Is this because the Hohō used by Kirinji Tenjirō was not “Shunpo”?
questions.reponse: It’s the same Shunpo. Shunpo consists of a three stage process: Joritsu, Bakkyaku and Shunpo. Tenjirō is incredibly skilled at the second stage, “Bakkyaku”, which allows him to achieve unbelievable speeds.

questions.question: Can’t Orihime heal Izuru’s body?
questions.reponse: She may be able to heal him, but Izuru probably likes it that way….

questions.question: Did sensei have any involvement in selecting the songs and characters for Burikon: Bleach Concept Covers?
questions.reponse: I wasn’t involved at all, but I remember liking Mayuri and Nemu’s part.

questions.question: What material is the Substitute Shinigami Badge made of?
questions.reponse: The Substitute’s Badge is made of metal. Iron would be too heavy for something of that size, so maybe aluminum would be a closer fit…?

questions.question: Does Ise Nanao wear glasses because her eyesight has deteriorated by reading too many books? Or is it that the Ise clan are by nature a family with poor eyesight?
questions.reponse: It’s a family with poor eyesight.

questions.question: In volume 62, Urahara-san mentioned that the Quincy are “a race that have no 'antibodies’ at all to defend against Hollows.” Is Uryū special?
questions.reponse: Uryū is special.

questions.question: Why does Akon have horns on his head?
questions.reponse: They’re implants (transdermal implants).

questions.question: Dordoni, Cirucci, Luppi and Chuhlhourne were all revived at the hands of Mayuri-sama... is this perhaps the benevolence of Mayuri-sama?
questions.reponse: I too looked at and thought “who knew Mayuri could be so kind!

questions.question: If he were able to Hollowfy properly, would he have been able to manifest the mask with horns that covered his entire face as shown in the battle against Ulquiorra?
questions.reponse: If he were able to “properly” Hollowfy, then he would take on that form.

questions.question: While in the Dangai, what mechanism did Ulquiorra use to show Orihime the situation in the Human World as images via Garganta?
questions.reponse: There’s no lore about this at all!! What kind of system is it!? Ulquiorra!!?

questions.question: Among the spirits of her Shun Shun Rikka, Tsubaki is the only one who is rebellious towards his master. Is that a reaction stemming from Orihime’s dislike of conflict?
questions.reponse: That’s correct. How impressive, I didn’t expect someone to read so deeply into Rikka like this.

questions.question: Regarding Orihime’s ability, Shun Shun Rikka: Sōten Kisshun, is it that Shun Shun Rikka’s abilities come from Orihime’s own feelings of rejection and denial?
questions.reponse: You are more or less correct. The things that can be restored with Sōten Kisshun are, for the most part, what is visible to the eyes and what can be touched with the hands.

questions.question: Kubo-sensei, is there a character in BLEACH that you consider to be closest to you in terms of your own personality?
questions.reponse: There isn’t. No one that I draw resembles me!

questions.question: Did Kūkaku somehow sense this connection between Ichigo and Isshin?
questions.reponse: Kūkaku has been aware of this through Ichigo’s Reiatsu since the beginning (volume 9). That’s why she let Ganju go with him. Of course, she also received a message from Kisuke at a later time.

questions.question: The masks of Loly Aivirrne and Menoly Mallia appear to have a design that forms a pair with the left and right eyes, perhaps they are Arrancar with a relationship like that of twin sisters?
questions.reponse: Although these two are not sisters, they have taken a sisterly vow and shaved down their masks in order to resemble each other.

questions.question: I believe there are works which publish illustrations drawn by readers in the tankōbon of the manga. Bleach didn’t have that, but is it that you have a certain preference towards your own tankōbon, Kubo-sensei?
questions.reponse: As a child, I was the type of kid who thought “I didn’t buy this to see drawings from readers” when looking at the illustration segment of the manga I used to read, so I didn’t do it with my own manga.

questions.question: The Captains of the Zero Division are each given one of the five cities atop the Zeroban Riden, but if the number of Zero Division captains increased, will a new Zeroban Riden be added?
questions.reponse: The upper limit is 5 people.

questions.question: What does the “chain” in Tensa Zangetsu represent? Is it the Chain of Fate?
questions.reponse: “Tensa” means “to lock the heavens”, and it’s a chain used to link and secure two things together.

questions.question: What material is the black part of Riruka’s clothes made of?
questions.reponse: It’s stretch cotton.

questions.question: I would like to know the nationality of the Sternritter!!!
questions.reponse: In order to avoid a fixed nationality for the group as a whole, I name them in a way which appears to contain spellings from various regions.

questions.question: In what way did Yamamoto and Unohana come to meet?
questions.reponse: I might draw it someday, so it’s a secret.

questions.question: In his KaraBuri profile, it is noted that the food Hisagi dislikes is sea urchin, but where did he eat it?
questions.reponse: He ruined it for himself after eating the cheap sea urchin he could afford on his salary.

questions.question: When Rangiku woke up from Hakufuku, she said “this sensation… it’s Hakufuku…” Could it be that she is acquainted with the feeling because Shinigami experience it during their time at the Shin'ō Academy?
questions.reponse: They experience this in class, but Rangiku also has the experience of falling victim to it.

questions.question: In the Thousand-Year Blood War arc, I believe Captain Komamura takes on a human-like form through the Humanization Technique, however, did he suddenly turn into a wolf after the battle because the technique’s time limit had expired?
questions.reponse: You are pretty much correct. The “Humanization Technique” is a technique that allows him to maintain a human form while withstanding his great-grandfather’s curse. The moment the purpose of Humanization becomes a selfish desire, the curse is forcibly fulfilled, and one transforms into a beast.

questions.question: No matter how many times I read the manga, I still don’t quite understand the relationship between Nelliel and Nnoitra.
questions.reponse: Even if you don’t understand, it doesn’t mean you’re stupid. Just enjoy it when you do understand.

questions.question: If “Qualkreis” is broadly classified as a Quincy tactic, could it also be considered one of the Kirchenlied?
questions.reponse: “Qualkreis” is one of the Quincy spells. “Kirchenlied” is not a classification, but a “chant” for “Sankt Zwinger”.

questions.question: During the Decisive Battle of Karakura Town, is it because of an illusion created by Kyōka Suigetsu that Mashiro’s mask broke away without her noticing the depletion of her own Reiatsu?
questions.reponse: It’s because Mashiro is just that kind of person who would allow a slip-up like that to happen.

questions.question: Izuru was quite cheerful during his student days, so why did his personality become gloomy?
questions.reponse: Wait, he was cheerful…? Izuru has been gloomy since the minute he was born.

questions.question: Captain Unohana named herself “Yachiru”, but her current name “Retsu”, is that originally her real name?
questions.reponse: “Retsu” is the name given to her by her father.

questions.question: After absorbing Ayon, Quilge’s appearance steadily returns to its original form, but could this be because his Heiligenschein was destroyed by Ichigo?
questions.reponse: It’s because his Heiligenschein was destroyed and thus his “Piskiel” collapsed.

questions.question: I’m debating whether or not I should have my son take lessons in English conversation. Is sensei able to speak English?
questions.reponse: Since being able to speak English is an advantage, please allow him to learn it. I can’t speak it myself, though.
